reviews.review_description:
I bought this early on.  Played it - loved it - got to the final level, but haven’t played for a while.  

Booted up today - and now I have to pay to access levels??!!??  

What the absolute F??!

I know it’s just a game, but I’m genuinely pissed!  What a total rip off bunch a monsters.  

I hope your own agent shoots you in a VR reality one day.

developer_response.body:
Hi John ,

We’re aware of the issue affecting players who purchased the game before it became free.

First of all, we’re sorry. If you bought the game earlier and lost access to content, that should not have happened. We understand why this is frustrating, and you’re right to be upset.

We haven’t been able to give this game the attention it needed recently, and that led to this issue taking longer to address than it should have. We’re now looking into the problem and working on a solution for affected players.

Our goal is to make sure players like you, who supported the game early, are treated fairly. We’ll share an update as soon as we have a clear fix or next steps.

Thank you for your patience, and again, we’re sorry for the frustration this caused.

reviews.review_description: Is the only way to continue after chapter 1 is to buy internal credits or is there a way to win them? I finish the first chapter with 1920 credits, but impossible to buy anything. I restart the game, 0 credit. What's going on?

developer_response.body: Hi Josay. Thank you for your feedback. It looks like there is an issue here. We’ll check this.

reviews.review_title: Bait and switch. Only one level is free
reviews.review_description: I was excited when I saw this game became free as I had it wishlisted. The first stage was fun and I was excited to proceed but then find out you have to buy their credits and each stage is $4 and you could probably beat them in 15 minutes

reviews.review_title: Purchased game and lost access to all le
reviews.review_description:
Great game I purchased as an early adopter, unlocked all levels until they removed access to the them bar level one under a pay wall. 

Bad business ethics.

Hi Robtyketto,

We’re aware of the issue affecting players who purchased the game before it became free.

First of all, we’re sorry. If you bought the game earlier and lost access to content, that should not have happened. We understand why this is frustrating, and you’re right to be upset.

reviews.review_description: Please add Gun pitch and Gun Yaw settings so I can use the Ace pistol like in Dead Second and phistol whip I will give it 5 stars.
Super addictive.   Fantastic onrails shooter.

If you're a fan of arcade shooters in VR, you'll love this game. Each level is short and begins with choosing a perk. Maybe it's just me, but I found the game has weird difficulty spikes. The first several levels were quite easy, and then I was hit with a super-hard level. But once you get into the flow, you won't be able to put it down.

This is a nice little shooter.

You play as an agent and after a nice tutorial, you work your way through levels, shooting agents and dodging their bullets as you go. 
Completing levels gives you medals which you need to collect to unlock other levels.

Between levels you get to choose a power up, some make the game easier, and some harder… like slow time, more powerful shots ect…

Graphics are nice and clean and the game play simple and fun.

Any ages can play this, and it can be played sitting down too

Early impressions review 

This is one of those games, that gets overlooked in the FPS genre, so much to enjoy about this game.
It has the hallmarks of Superhot, Action hero, crisis brigade, it’s definitely up there with these games.

On rails so will suit those who get motion sickness, just dodge and duck to miss the bullets.
Graphics really suit the genre and type of game it is.

Looking forward to really getting stuck into this game.
Nice one by the devs. Definitely one for fans of shooters.

This game has a pretty simple premise, you are a special agent with some special powers, you can pick which one you want to use before you enter each mission. 

You then use that power to shoot a whole bunch of goons preferably in the head whilst dodging their bullets.

A kind of super hot, John wick, Hard bullet hybrid.

And that gameplay loop is incredibly satisfying and addictive.

reviews.review_title: Challenging & Fun with a twist of lemon!
reviews.review_description:
Love how you can vary which special gun power up you can select to get through each stage, this adds lots of replay ability and a chance to use different tactics.
It’s highly immersive, it feels awesome and time flies when you play as it’s very addicting. 
My only negative point is that I’m not overly impressed with the gun sounds. 
This is a great foundation for a great game and I hope it gets the support it deserves from quest users, so that more and more levels and challenges get added in 2025!

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for your feedback! We are working on new updates, which will be revealed soon.

reviews.review_title: I feel Like John Wick in the Matirx
reviews.review_description:
I love this game! can't recommend this game enough! Its literally what John Wick/Neo would have felt . I am still on level 4, and I can't put this game down. 

My Fav part about the game is, when you get in the zone and you start head-shot-ing bad guys as they appear, specially in the levels that you are moving  and the bad guys keep on appearing. 

I am on the level where you have to fight Agent Smith, he moves fast so you dodge and shoot. 

The only feedback I would add is, Skins for guns and probably bad guys too. 
Would love to have different pistols with different sounds, hopefully the game takes off and we see these in the future update

I have only dropped in to get a feel and it reminds me of John Wick/Neo. The graphics are simplistic yet really suits the style of play, the environments are super detailed, and the missions are intense and varied. Whether you're defusing bombs, sneaking through enemy compounds, or engaging in high-speed chases, the gameplay never gets old.
The controls are smooth and intuitive, and the game makes amazing use of VR mechanics. I also love how customizable the difficulty is, making it great for both newcomers and experienced players.
If you’ve ever dreamed of being a spy, this is the closest you’ll get without actually joining an agency. A must-play for any VR fan!

reviews.review_title: High quality with lots of potential.
reviews.review_description:
I say "with lots of potential" because it's not finished yet and has a roadmap, so I look forward to improvements and new content. 
Good stuff first, it has a striking art style that works with the limitations of the headset, while still filling the level with life and detail. Gameplay is sorta like Superhot VR, expect there the time mechanics are different. You choose your power each level, and the loadout is different each time, tailored to the level design. So levels with lots of cover and pedestrians can give you the choice to curve your bullets, or levels with lots of reflexes needed can give you the choice to activate different types of slow-mo. There's already a lot of levels, though they range from normal length to REALLY short. But the powers and length/design of the levels encourage lots of replay value to speedrun or get better scores for accuracy. 
Now for the bad. It can sometimes be hard, even on the easiest difficulty. The powers help a lot, but it's almost impossible to beat some levels without them, at least for my skill level. You'll either run out of time, or ammo (depending on the power you're using). Also, it might be me, but I can't figure out how to replay certain levels it takes me to. Like, I would beat the final level in chapter one, then a tutorial on bullet curves, then it tells me I'm on chapter 6, even though I didn't unlock it yet, and I can't find that exact level on the list of available levels. Lastly, at least for tutorials, the option for subtitles would be nice, but it doesn't have that, as far as I can tell. 
Overall, it's a solid and addicting game of bite-sized challenges. Not sure why it's called Agent Simulator, since you don't blend in, steal intel, or hack or anything. You just shoot disposable guards. But you still feel cool.

I started playing this recently and it was quickly becoming my new favourite game, but then levels started as you progress where it moves for you and the motion sickness sets in so I had to quit. 

It would be nice to have an option for people who suffer with motion sickness to be able to skip the levels where the character moves for you as the rest of the game is fine where you can just shoot to move. Unfortunately I can’t play any further ☹️

The game is very fun and I know alot of people compare it to super hot but I honestly think its in its realm of its own the the art work and different type of powers ups and level and sometime you can pick the choice of speed it has plenty of fun levels and different difficulties with power ups that makes the game harder or easier there is a glitch though on chapter one once you beat it it takes you to a chapter 6 mission maybe its part of the game or just a bug but if you like fast paste or take your time shooter games I highly recommend this one you actually feel like your'e an agent
Agents we need to shoot looks like Emanuel Macron, which is nice :)

I played the demo over and over again and was afraid that there would never be anything more.
But here it is and I'm absolutely thrilled! I love these entertaining games in VR and this title particularly impresses with its required precision and excellent style paired with appropriate music and soundscape. The short, quick missions with lots of action are exactly why I put on VR glasses and sweat for a few minutes while trying to reach 100%.
Can I have some more, please!
I am incredibly happy and grateful for the additional content!

I enjoy it nearly as much as Pistol Whip+Dead Second (good replayability), but with some "slowing down" flaws:
- unnecessary: levels broken up to tiny sublevels/checkpoints with compulsory options (time, bullets, ammo)
- unnecessary: restrictive - eg. limited ammo slow you down and why not have bullet slow motion anytime you wish to enjoy (or anytime you shoot multiple agents at once like in Dead Second)!

So I would prefer difficulty set per/via main profile +- level, but not combined with these sublevels/checkpoints (time, bullets, ammo). +I prefer standard (swipe down) gun charging.
Otherwise, good job!

UPDATE: OK, now I see that it has infinite reloads in next level.. Also I would appreciate e.g. dual guns.. And custom mode, where I can choose e.g. dual guns and infinite gun reloading.. Overall it seems fine but still quite short sublevels..

developer_response.body: Hi, Thanks for feedbacks, We will shape the game depends on feedbacks. We are collecting feedback and will update the game regularly.

reviews.review_description:
I never got on with pistol whip the weird flashes, colours and distortions it has put me off and I can't see where the bullets are coming from, but this is so much better! 

Awesome upgrades and the slow motion is incredibly satisfying. Just an all round superb. Oh and the developers are also super cool!

reviews.review_title: I’m the coolest agent in the world
reviews.review_description: Makes me feel like john wick yo
I bought it on my mobile phone but the game wont appear on my library to download

developer_response.body: Hi Sorry for the problem, You can contact with meta store.

reviews.review_description: By far one of the best games on the oculus hands down! The graphics are good it's way better than super hot it has tons of action and very addictive! Take John Wick and Mix it with the Matrix!

I've been playing the Demo for a long time and could not wait for the next move of the game to happen.  I bought it and love what you have done with it.   Can't wait to see what else you will do to continually improve the game.

If John Wick, The Matrix, and Super Hot VR had a baby, this is the result that would've came out. No, seriously, this game makes you feel like John wick/Neo from The Matrix, it's incredible!. Highly addictive and fun game. This game needs to come to the main quest store, It needs that much more recognition. My only gripe with it so far, is that sometimes I can be point on with my shot and still miss, or the game doesn't register the shot to the head or body. The gun need to be more accurate, and the bullet that I shoot needs to travel faster. There's times where I shoot my gun 10 or so milliseconds(for an example)because my reaction time is soo much quicker before they shoot, which should give me the advantage, but their bullets when they shoot reaches me first than my faster reaction shot. That's absolutely ridiculous. Also can you guys please add an option in the settings for vertical gun axis rotation. It would really help for better aiming. Overall great game. Please keep working hard on this game to make it the best it can be, and I will be looking forward to more upcoming content for this game. Thank you for your hard work on this game. I am a huge fan of it so far. 🙏

developer_response.body: Hi, Thanks for feedbacks. We will review your feedback.

reviews.review_description:
Worth every penny and then some.

Such a good game and a must buy in my opinion. Crazy that this is an applab game and not in the main store.

Things I'd like to see: option to turn off laser pointer in easier difficulties (particularly casual) and protube haptics - this game would be so good with a provolver!!

developer_response.body: Hi Thanks for review, We will add laser pointer off option in settings soon.

reviews.review_description:
Agent Simulation is an action, simulation, and strategy game all rolled into one! In which each player shows their targeting skills and agility against enemies in a virtual environment. 

At the end of each mission, you will collect medals and earn various certificates with these medals 🎖️ 

At the end of the game, these certificates will prove your strength as an agent and help you to receive your agent license 😎

In each level of the ‘Agent Simulation’, you will be evaluated according to your targeting skills. Before the limited time provided ends, you must kill all your enemies. 

Every successful head shot will get you more points! Sometimes you will be asked to complete the missions in such a limited time, you have to be fast and agile! 

There will be three options offered in each level and those options will constantly change! For example, double bullets, double damage, slowing time down, blocking bullets or extra life, etc. 

You can strategize using any of these options!

Fight to be the best!

This game had me ducking and diving! It reminds me of Pistol Whip/ Super Hot! It’s got an amazing vibe to it, and will certainly keep you fit, the further you get the more challenging it becomes. Although you do have three different ability levels so you can ease yourself in gently! 

Brilliant Game I love it!!
The game is extremely enjoyable. I particularly enjoyed the 'bullet control' mechanic, which was very satisfying. I'm eagerly looking forward to the new content coming with updates.
Best movie scene game, I recommend you!

I'm a big fan of fast paced action packed games and this one really hits the spot, I felt like I was Neo. other than the action, you can tell comfort and ease of use were devs top priorities. as for the graphics; its simple and stylized with a lot of cool visual effects. this is not a game this is a must have experience
Great fun.  It’s like a cross between superhot and the matrix. Love these style of games in VR!
